ab: Kaynu’, ukas a quwaw i imu la, usa’ mabaynay isu’ han.
ch: W:Kaynu’，家裡沒有酒了，你先去買。
en: Kaynu, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: kiya na’ qutux tahusan i gaghapuyan, hanuan ini’ baynay la!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: iqaat pakacka’ i qutux tahusan, usa’ mabaynay lawwi cu usayng tahusan.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: pabaynay ci cu quwaw, matibaynay cimu qu?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: kiya ga, piya’ a babinasun su’?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: pabaynay kuwing cu usayng tahusan ru qutux cabu’ a buwax.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: kiya runi ku buwax, nanuwan ku aalun su’ na’?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: pabaynay kuwing uwi cu batu’, kiya qu?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: naqarun matibaynay ku batu’ niyam la.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: pabaynay kuwing cu situwing.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: humicuwa’ ku su’uwaan su’?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: pabaynay kuwing cku isting a uyit ka situwing.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: micuwa’ ku matanah kahani?
en: How about this red one?

ab: kiya ruma’ ka iru’ qu?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: kiya na’ a mauba’ kinku mawaseq.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: alani kuwing ku mataseq kahaca.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Kaynu’, minusa’ si inu’ sawni’ la? minusa’ si maktaliyum qu?
ch: W:Kaynu’ 你剛剛去哪裡了? 你去運動嗎?
en: Kaynu’, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: iqaat, minusa’ ci rumag yaki’ matibaynay cu raramat.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: aqu muwani, kiya a hreq na waw si gabiyan qu? papaglu si maneq ki kuwing qu?
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: aqeh, mausa’ ci mabaynay cu situwing.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: nanu’ gumalgay ci isu’ musa’.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: lawkah su’! piya’ pila’ qutux cu bhul ku paruxaw kahani?
ch: M:你好！請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: mapusal pila’ qutux cu bhul.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: piya’ pila’ ku bunga’ kahani?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: matul pila’ qutux tintin.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: mabinasay ci cu usayng bhul paruxaw ru qutux tintin a bunga’.
ch: M:我買兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
